risks.mitigation: Expand supervised evidence in rollout planning phase with strict abort criteria.
Keep pilot allowlisted and define production-limited safeguards before any rollout execution.
Re-run runtime smoke and endpoint readiness checks in each next PRD stage.
Keep prompt delta limits and monitor long-context outliers in supervised telemetry.
Retain trace-only Diagnostic Center mode and compare-layer observability gates.
Enforce rollback-first operator checklist with explicit force-disabled verification.
Continue sanitized artifact policy and run artifact encoding/hygiene validator each cycle.
Add broader scenario variance in planning PRD while preserving no-effect gates.
